Auth.signupSubtitle: Customers discover boutiques. Boutique owners register their studio after signup.
Auth.loginSubtitle: Access your dashboard, orders, and boutique portal.
Auth.passwordHint: Use a strong password with upper & lower case, a number, and a special character.
Auth.registeredMessage: Account created. Check your email if confirmation is required, then sign in.
Auth.supabaseNotConfigured: Supabase is not configured. Add credentials to .env.local.
Auth.signupFailed: Sign up failed. Please try again.
Auth.requestTimeout: Request timed out. Restart the dev server and try again.

Hero.subtitle: Discover highly rated boutiques, browse designer portfolios and get your dream outfits created with confidence — along with secure payments and verified reviews.

Footer.tagline: It All Starts With a Thread

Home.featuredClothingSubtitle: Outfits from verified boutiques across FADEN — tap any piece for photos, videos, and boutique details.

Alterations.title: Book an Alteration
Alterations.subtitle: Describe what you need — we'll match you with the nearest available boutique, often within 2 hours for urgent requests.
Alterations.alterationTypeHint: Hem, waist adjustment, sleeve length, fitting, etc.
Alterations.alterationTypePlaceholder: e.g. Shorten lehenga hem by 2 inches, tighten blouse waist…
Alterations.urgency: How soon do you need it?
Alterations.urgencyHint: Urgent requests (within 2 hours) are routed to the nearest open boutique.
Alterations.homeServiceHint: A boutique staff member can visit your location if available.
Alterations.homeAddressPlaceholder: Full address for pickup or home visit
Alterations.photosHint: Upload clear photos of the area that needs alteration.
Alterations.notesPlaceholder: Fabric type, event date, special instructions…
Alterations.matchingBoutique: We're matching you with the nearest available boutique.

RegisterBoutique.title: Register Your Boutique
RegisterBoutique.subtitle: List your portfolio, services, and trust signals to join India's boutique fashion platform.

Upload.fileHint: JPG, PNG, or short videos · up to {maxImages} files · {maxMb} MB each
Upload.pasteUrls: Or paste image/video URLs, one per line

overview.pendingVerification: Your studio is in the admin verification queue. You'll appear on discovery once approved.
overview.approveToStart: Approve your boutique to start receiving customer requests
overview.ordersWhenLive: Orders and messages appear when customers customize with your studio

empty.alterationsBody: Alteration requests appear once your boutique is registered and verified.
empty.listingsBody: Listing settings appear once your boutique is verified.
empty.analyticsBody: Analytics appear once your boutique is live and receiving customer activity.
empty.performanceBody: Performance metrics build as you fulfill orders and collect reviews.
empty.staffBody: Staff management is available once your boutique is registered and verified.

marketing.title: Marketing Tools
marketing.items: Featured listings, promotions, discount campaigns, festival offers, sponsored placement

Customize.selectAudience: Select who this outfit is for (Women, Men, or Kids).
Customize.selectOutfitType: Select an outfit type before finding boutiques.
Customize.submittedBody: Your boutique will review your request and reply with a quotation.
Customize.nextSteps: Next: quotation → payment → production tracking → delivery → review

start.requirementsHint: Continue through the steps to describe your outfit. At the end, we'll suggest boutiques that match your requirements.
start.chooseBoutiqueHint: Start typing a boutique name — matching studios appear as you type.

category.whoForHint: Select Women, Men, or Kids so the boutique knows who will wear it.
category.describeOutfitHint: Type freely if your outfit isn't listed above.
category.describePlaceholder: e.g. Floor-length lehenga with cape sleeves and minimal embroidery…
category.occasionHint: Start typing — suggestions appear, or pick one below.

inspiration.linksHint: Paste links from Pinterest, Instagram, or other apps — one per line.
inspiration.sketchHint: Describe neckline, length, or other alterations.
inspiration.sketchPlaceholder: Notes about neckline changes, length adjustments…

mixOutfit.label: Mixing two outfits?
mixOutfit.hint: Describe what you want from each reference. Discuss feasibility with the boutique before combining elements from two designs.
mixOutfit.notesPlaceholder: From outfit 1 I want the sleeve… from outfit 2 the skirt…
mixOutfit.linksHint: Paste one link per line — Pinterest, Instagram, shopping sites, etc.
mixOutfit.photosHint: Upload up to {max} images (max {maxMb} MB each).

fabric.customerProvides: I will provide my own material
fabric.fabricHint: Start typing — suggestions appear for silk, georgette, cotton, and more.
fabric.coloursHint: Start typing — colour suggestions appear as you type. Add multiple separated by commas.
fabric.colourCount: How many colours in the outfit?
fabric.advanceNote: Advance payment: max 40% when boutique supplies material. Otherwise pay only when work is complete and you are satisfied.

design.intro: Describe each design element with suggestions or your own words, and upload reference photos for every option so the boutique can see exactly what you want.

delivery.dateHint: We advise ordering 1–2 days earlier for alterations or last-minute changes.

review.directOrder: Direct order: replicating "{title}" with the size and lengths from the outfit page.
review.withBoutique: Review your request before sending it to your chosen boutique.
review.withoutBoutique: Review your request, then browse suggested boutiques and pick one before submitting.

fields.portfolioPhotosHint: Upload portfolio photos or paste URLs — show your best work.
fields.allClothingHint: We customize everything — women's, men's, and kids' wear across all outfit types.
fields.outfitTypesHint: List women's, men's, and kids' types — e.g. Lehenga, Sherwani, Kids Kurta.
fields.pricingPlaceholder: Describe your pricing ranges per garment type
fields.verificationMediaHint: Upload workshop, portfolio, or storefront photos. Required — or FADEN will schedule a visit.
fields.reviewsPlaceholder: Written reviews, delivery ratings, quality ranges
fields.adminNotePlaceholder: Explain what changed or why you updated your profile…

footer.modifyVerified: Submit your changes for admin review.
footer.modifyNoChanges: Change at least one field to enable submission.
footer.registerRequired: Required: basic details, outfit types, and services (check all sections).

success.registrationBody: Our team will verify your portfolio and trust signals. You'll receive dashboard access once approved.
success.modificationBody: Our team will review your changes. Your live profile stays unchanged until approved.
success.updatedBody: Your boutique registration has been updated.
success.pendingBody: You submitted changes on {date}. Your live profile stays unchanged until an admin approves the request.

errors.updateOneField: Update at least one field before submitting.
errors.requestTimeout: Request timed out. Restart the dev server and try again.

owner.title: Incoming alteration requests
owner.emptyBody: When customers book alterations on FADEN, matched requests appear here. Add "Alterations" to your services in Products & Services to receive more bookings.

customer.emptyBody: Book a quick alteration with a nearby boutique — often within 2 hours for urgent requests.
